title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Announces the Launch of +LC Solutions
text: The +LC solutions are a key step forward for LyondellBasell's (LYB) customers as they strive for more ambitious GHG emission reduction targets and product circularity.

title: LyondellBasell Demonstrates Commitment to Sustainability with Launch of +LC (Low Carbon) Solutions
text: HOUSTON , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- LyondellBasell today announced the expansion of its sustainable offerings with the launch of its +LC (Low Carbon) solutions, a new range of Intermediates and Derivatives (I&D) chemicals produced under an International Sustainability and Carbon Certification (ISCC) PLUS certified mass balance methodology.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Invests in Plastic Circularity Fund
text: Investments made by LyondellBasell (LYB) in venture capital include LOIM, Closed Loop Partners, Infinity Recycling, HX Venture and Chrysalix.

title: LyondellBasell to Address J.P. Morgan 14th Annual U.S. All Stars Conference
text: HOUSTON and LONDON, Sept. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- LyondellBasell, a leader in the global chemical industry, today announced Michael McMurray, executive vice president and chief financial officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the J.P.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Starts Discourse on Production Unit Closure
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) believes that closing this unit is the most sustainable response, both strategically and financially.

title: LyondellBasell's Cyclical Downturn May Be A Great Buying Opportunity For Long-Term Investors
text: LyondellBasell is currently going through a cyclical downturn and may offer a great buying opportunity for long-term investors. LYB offers great shareholder benefits by providing a strong 5% dividend yield and a 34mm share buyback program. The company is transforming its operations to focus on sustainable, renewables-centric, and circular business models, with a goal of producing 2 million tons of recycled/renewable-based polymers annually by 2030.

title: LyondellBasell to Host MoReTec Technology Webinar on September 26, 2023
text: HOUSTON and LONDON , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) will host a MoReTec Technology Webinar on Tuesday, September 26 from 8 a.m – 9 a.m.

title: LyondellBasell Industries: The Reason We Maintain Our Bullish Rating, Despite The Poor Quarterly Results
text: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. has delivered weak Q2 results with a significant decline in revenue and EPS. The company has cited macroeconomic uncertainty and a slow recovery in China as reasons for the disappointing results. Despite the weak results, the company's stock appears to be fairly valued based on its current dividend and dividend growth.
